svg.text: This demo covers the previously unsupported `clip-path: path(...)` cases: curved paths, compound evenodd windows, and image
crops defined by SVG-style path data instead of the basic inset/circle/ellipse/polygon functions.
A single curved path clipped from a gradient
A compound `path()` clip with an interior cut-out.
An image clipped by a curved leaf-like
A compound path with side cut-outs using the
